name: Rose & Oud: The Unified Dream Ice Breaker

details.title: Rose & Oud: The Unified Dream Ice Breaker
details.specialty: Yeh kit Ice Breaker series ka grand finale hai, jo specifically design kiya gaya hai "Long-term Planning" aur "Shared Future" ke liye. Iski sabse badi speciality iska "Visionary Deck" hai, jisme deep aur constructive sawal hain jaise ki "What is a dream we can build together?" Fragrance mein Rose aur Oud ka blend hai—Rose romance ko trigger karta hai aur Oud ek strong, grounding effect deta hai, jisse couples bina kisi hesitation ke apne bade sapno aur goals ke baare mein baat kar sakein. Yeh sirf ek date nahi, balki ek partnership building exercise hai.
details.usage: Set the mood by lighting the candle in a quiet space where you both feel comfortable dreaming big. Draw a card and take turns answering. Let the deep, luxurious aroma guide your thoughts toward the future you want to build together.
details.process: Candle ko ek luxury dark-amber glass vessel mein dala gaya hai jo candle ki flame ko ek deep golden glow deta hai. Wax mein premium Bulgarian Rose extracts aur smokey Oud oils ka use kiya gaya hai for a sophisticated aroma. Iska card box ek dual-tone metallic rose aur mauve finish mein aata hai, jisme rounded-corner cards hain jo rose-gold borders ke sath aate hain, taaki har card nikaalte waqt ek premium "gift" jaisa feel aaye.

name: Mild Rose: The Anniversary Dine-In Kit

details.title: Mild Rose: The Anniversary Dine-In Kit
details.specialty: This kit is the crown jewel of the "Dine In" collection, specifically curated to transform a home-cooked anniversary dinner into a 5-star sensory experience. The speciality lies in the Aroma-Harmony technology—the "Mild Rose" fragrance is engineered to be exceptionally light and non-intrusive. Unlike standard candles, it complements the natural aroma of your food, enhancing the dining experience rather than competing with it. It’s designed for partners who want to bring the elegance of a luxury restaurant into their own dining room, creating a romantic, softly lit sanctuary for their special milestones.
details.usage: Arrange the pillar candle as the central focus of your table and place the two taper candles on either side to create a classic "Golden Triangle" of light. Light the wicks 15 minutes before the meal is served to allow the subtle floral notes to settle and blend perfectly with the savory aromas of your dinner.
details.process: The kit features a multi-candle arrangement: one large, textured pillar candle and two elegant, slim taper candles. All are hand-poured using a 100% premium soy wax blend to ensure a clean, soot-free, and long-lasting burn. The pillar candle is finished with a luxury parchment label and metallic gold branding. The entire set is housed in a bespoke, chocolate-brown "Meltix" signature box featuring intricate gold filigree embossing.

name: Emerald Evening: The Gourmet Dine-In Kit

details.title: Emerald Evening: The Gourmet Dine-In Kit
details.specialty: This kit is designed for the couple that treats every home-cooked meal like a culinary event. The speciality of this set is its neutralizing scent profile—the wax is infused with very light, crisp notes of white tea and ginger, specifically chosen to cleanse the palate and clear the air of cooking smells like garlic or oils without clashing with your food. It provides the perfect "Golden Hour" lighting for your table, making the presentation of your dishes look as good as they taste. It's the ultimate gift for a partner who loves to host "Dine In" dates, turning your kitchen table into a sophisticated bistro.
details.usage: Place the central pillar candle as your anchor piece and set the two taper candles in your favorite holders on either end of the table. Light all three just as you begin plating the food to signal the start of a focused, intentional meal where the conversation and the flavors are the stars of the show.
details.process: This premium trio includes one wide pillar candle and two elegant taper candles, all hand-cast in a creamy, high-quality soy wax blend. The candles are wrapped in sophisticated textured parchment labels with rose-gold foiling. The entire kit is presented in a luxury forest-green gift box with a rose-gold metallic trim and a plush cream-colored insert that keeps the candles perfectly protected.

name: White Musk: The Dine-In Romance Kit

details.title: White Musk: The Dine-In Romance Kit
details.specialty: This kit is for the partner who loves a "sensory-rich" dining experience that goes beyond just the food. The speciality here is the Botanical-Infusion pillar and the separate White Musk Essence vial. The fragrance is designed with a "Clean Base" profile—it doesn't fight against the aroma of your food. Instead, the soft white musk creates a luxurious atmosphere that feels like a private fine-dining room. It makes the date interactive by allowing you to control the scent intensity throughout the meal, ensuring the atmosphere is as curated as the menu.
details.usage: Arrange the petal-embedded pillar as your main center-piece and light the two taper candles to add height and a warm, flattering glow to the table. For an extra sensory boost between courses, uncork the "White Musk Essence" vial to refresh the air and transition the mood from dining to deep conversation.
details.process: The main pillar candle is hand-poured with premium soy wax and features real, hand-pressed dried peony petals embedded within the outer layers for an organic, artisanal look. The two cream-colored taper candles are designed to be dripless and smokeless to keep your table setting pristine. The entire kit is presented in a boutique-quality taupe gift box with embossed copper branding.

name: Sandalwood Infusion: The Earthy Dine-In Kit

details.title: Sandalwood Infusion: The Earthy Dine-In Kit
details.specialty: This kit is designed for couples who enjoy bold, rich flavors and deep, grounding conversations. The speciality of the Sandalwood Infusion is its warm, woody aroma that acts as a perfect backdrop for a hearty meal. Unlike floral scents that can clash with savory dishes, sandalwood complements the "umami" notes of a dinner—making it ideal for nights involving red wine, grilled specialties, or rich pastas. It creates a sophisticated, "fine-dining" atmosphere that makes staying at home feel like a luxury getaway, helping partners focus entirely on the food and each other.
details.usage: Arrange the large, textured pillar candle in the center of your table to act as the "heart" of the meal. Place the two slim taper candles in gold holders on either side to add elegant, flickering height. Light the set 10 minutes before sitting down; the resulting "Golden Triangle" of light is specifically designed to cast a flattering, romantic glow across the table while the scent subtly preps the senses for a gourmet experience.
details.process: This premium trio features one hand-cast pillar candle with a unique "stone-texture" finish and two elegant, dripless taper candles. All are crafted from a 100% natural soy wax blend for a clean, non-toxic burn that won't interfere with the taste of your food. The pillar is finished with a minimalist gold "Meltix" band. The entire kit is housed in a boutique charcoal-brown gift box with embossed gold-foil branding and a custom-molded insert for maximum protection.

name: Rose & Sandalwood: The Signature Dine-In Romance Kit

details.title: Rose & Sandalwood: The Signature Dine-In Romance Kit
details.specialty: This is the flagship kit of the "Dine In" collection, designed for an unforgettable evening of high-end romance. The speciality is the Dual-Note Balance of delicate Rose and grounding Sandalwood. This specific combination is scientifically curated to stimulate both the heart and the mind—Rose triggers affection and romance, while Sandalwood provides a calm, steady energy. It’s the perfect companion for a multi-course dinner, ensuring the atmosphere transitions smoothly from the excitement of the meal to a deep, lingering connection long after the plates are cleared.
details.usage: Place the embossed rose pillar candle in the center of your table as the centerpiece. Arrange the two taper candles in their signature twisted copper holders on either side to create a sophisticated, warm glow. Light the set 15 minutes before dining to allow the sophisticated floral-woody aroma to harmonize with your food's presentation.
details.process: This kit features a premium hand-cast pillar candle with a custom-etched rose pattern and two drip-free taper candles. We use a high-grade soy wax blend for a clean, non-toxic burn. The set includes two exclusive twisted copper-finish candle holders. All elements are beautifully presented in a luxury burgundy gift box with rose-gold metallic detailing and a premium soft-touch finish.

name: Toasted Caramel & Hot Chocolate: The Cozy Movie Night Kit

details.title: Toasted Caramel & Hot Chocolate: The Cozy Movie Night Kit
details.specialty: This kit is designed for the ultimate "stay-at-home" date. The speciality of this set is the Gourmet Cinema Fragrance—a rich, indulgent blend of toasted caramel and velvety hot chocolate that instantly transforms your living room into a warm, cozy sanctuary. It moves beyond being a simple product by offering a complete ritual: from lighting the wicks with dedicated long-stem matches to extinguishing them with a premium snuffer. It’s the perfect gift for partners who value comfort and quality time, making even a casual movie marathon feel like a luxury private screening.
details.usage: Place both amber glass candles on a stable, heat-resistant surface within your movie-watching nook. Use the included Meltix matches to light the wicks just as the opening credits begin. When the evening is over, use the copper snuffer to extinguish the flames; this prevents unwanted smoke from interfering with the sweet lingering aroma and keeps the wax surface pristine for your next viewing.
details.process: This premium kit includes two 150g hand-poured candles in deep amber glass vessels that cast a soft, ambient glow. We use a high-quality, slow-burning soy-wax blend infused with premium, dessert-inspired fragrance oils for a long-lasting "hot throw." The set is completed with a heavy-duty copper-finish snuffer and a custom matchbox, all nestled within a luxury chocolate-brown velvet-lined gift box featuring embossed rose-gold branding.

details.title: The Cinema Lobby Duo
details.specialty: Yeh kit specifically "Netflix & Chill" nights ke liye banaya gaya hai. Iski speciality iski Dual-Scent Layering hai. Jab aap "Vanilla & Caramel Popcorn" ki mithaas aur "Dark Chocolate & Spice" ki depth ko ek saath jalate hain, toh ghar ka mahol bilkul ek high-end cinema lobby jaisa ho jata hai. Yeh un couples ke liye perfect hai jo bahar jaane ke bajaye ghar pe movie dekhna pasand karte hain, kyunki yeh unki movie night ko ek immersive sensory experience mein badal deta hai.
details.usage: Movie start hone se 15 minute pehle badi wali "Vanilla & Caramel Popcorn" candle jalayein taaki theatre wali base khushbu set ho jaye. Movie start hote hi choti "Dark Chocolate & Spice" candle jalayein jo mahol mein warmth aur depth add karegi. Movie khatam hone pe included copper snuffer ka use karein taaki smoke na ho aur popcorn ki mithi khushbu kamre mein bani rahe.
details.process: Is premium kit mein do alag hand-poured candles hain: ek 250g amber jar mein popcorn scent aur ek 150g frosted vessel mein chocolate scent. Dono mein high-quality soy-wax aur lead-free wicks use ki gayi hain. Kit ke saath ek luxury wooden matchbox aur ek precision copper snuffer aata hai, jo ek navy-blue Meltix gold-foil box mein beautifully pack hota hai.

details.title: The Sweet Marathon Trio
details.specialty: This kit is for the ultimate binge-watching session where one scent just isn’t enough. The speciality of this trio is the "Scent Transition" experience. It features three iconic dessert aromas—Toasted Caramel, Hot Chocolate, and Cinnamon Roll—designed to be layered throughout a movie marathon. It turns your living room into a gourmet bakery, making it the perfect gift for couples who love to "hibernation mode" together. It’s not just a candle; it’s a full sensory menu for your night in.
details.usage: Start your first movie by lighting the "Cinnamon Roll" candle to set a warm, bakery-fresh base. As the night progresses, light the "Toasted Caramel" for a deeper sweetness. Save the "Hot Chocolate" for the final film or late-night cuddles to bring a rich, velvety finish to the atmosphere. Use the included copper snuffer to "edit" your room's aroma without the smell of smoke interrupting the movie.
details.process: This set features three premium 150g hand-poured glass jars with sleek silver-chrome lids. We use a high-performance soy-wax blend that provides a consistent "hot throw" even in large rooms. The kit includes a custom Meltix matchbox and a precision-crafted rose-gold snuffer, all designed to sit beautifully on a coffee table or bedside.

details.title: The Netflix Sanctuary
details.specialty: This kit is for the couple whose favorite date night is a "Netflix Home" marathon. The speciality is the Decadent Scent Fusion—the buttery, golden mithaas of "Toasted Caramel" meets the deep, warm, and slightly kicky "Hot Chocolate & Spice." It’s designed to make your bedroom or living room feel like a high-end private suite. The spice notes are scientifically chosen to create a sense of physical warmth and comfort, making it the perfect "Stress-Buster" for a long week.
details.usage: Set the wooden tray on your bed or coffee table. Light the "Toasted Caramel" candle 10 minutes before starting your show to build a sweet base layer. As soon as you hit "Play," light the "Hot Chocolate & Spice" to add that rich, cozy depth. When the binge-watching is done, use the included bronze snuffer to extinguish the flames—it ensures the sweet aroma stays in the air without any smoky after-smell.
details.process: This premium set features two large 250g hand-poured glass jars: one in a warm amber finish and the other in a deep cocoa-tinted glass. We use a high-quality, slow-burning soy wax for a clean 55-hour burn. The kit comes complete with a custom-branded walnut wooden tray, a signature Meltix gold-foil matchbox, and a professional-grade long-handle bronze snuffer.

details.title: The Home Cinema Masterpiece
details.specialty: This is the grand finale of the "Cozy" collection. The speciality of this duo is the Streaming Sanctuary Ambiance—it is specifically designed to harmonize with the visual and audio energy of long-form movie marathons. The blend of Madagascar Vanilla, decadent Salted Caramel, and earthy Tonka Bean creates a "Premium Lounge" atmosphere that mimics the comfort of a 5-star private cinema. The Salted Caramel provides a savory-sweet hit that perfectly complements a bowl of popcorn, while the Tonka adds a sophisticated, woody depth that keeps the room feeling grounded and cozy for hours.
details.usage: Place both oversized jars on the coffee table to create a central glow. Light them 15 minutes before the opening credits to establish a rich, welcoming base layer of fragrance. The amber glass is designed to diffuse light softly, ensuring there is no glare on the TV screen during dark scenes. When the marathon is over, use the included copper snuffer to extinguish the flames; this preserves the sweet, lingering aroma in the room without the interruption of smoke.
details.process: This flagship kit features two 400g large-format amber apothecary jars with minimalist cream labels. The wax is a proprietary, slow-burning soy blend that ensures a clean, non-toxic burn for up to 70 hours per jar. We’ve utilized a double-concentration of fragrance oils to ensure the "hot throw" fills even large, open living rooms. The set is completed with a heavy-duty wooden matchbox and a precision rose-gold snuffer.

details.description_html:
What’s Inside
Everything you need for a VIP celebration in one box:
• Lotus Cake Centerpiece: A hand-sculpted cake candle featuring a blooming lotus.
• Rose Gold Tapers: Metallic twisted candles for a high-end glow.
• Signature Tapers: Sage and Blush textured candles to set the aesthetic.
• Celebration Poppers: Rose gold party poppers for the big reveal.
• Decor Kit: Mini metallic balloons and a surprise gift box.
• The Meltix Trunk: A premium, satin-lined sage green display box.

How to Use
The Reveal: Open the Meltix trunk to instantly transform any table into a party zone.
Ambiance: Light the surrounding taper candles first to build the mood.
The Big Moment: Light the lotus centerpiece and use the poppers the second the birthday song starts!

Specialty
Specially designed for Milestone Birthdays. This isn't just a candle set; it’s our signature "Story Candle" experience. It’s curated for those who want their celebration to look like a high-end editorial shoot while creating a memory that lasts long after the wax melts.

How We Made It
Each lotus centerpiece is hand-poured using a premium soy-blend wax for a clean, slow burn. We custom-dyed the sage and blush tapers to match current decor trends and finished the metallic elements with a food-safe rose gold coating. Every kit is hand-assembled to ensure the unboxing feels like a luxury event.

Wrap Up
Stop gifting basic candles. Give them a celebration they’ll actually remember. Meltix Birthday Grandeur—because they deserve the spotlight.

What’s Inside
The ultimate "after-dark" celebration kit for those who love high-end glitz:
• Faceted Gold Pillar: A heavy, geometric centerpiece candle with a brilliant metallic finish.
• Shimmering Mini Tins: Six metallic candle tins (Gold & Rose Gold) for a scattered, ambient glow.
• Taper Match Boutique: A custom box of extra-long matches for a sophisticated light-up.
• Celebration Crackers: Two rose gold crackers to add a playful "pop" to the night.
• Elite Wick Snuffer: A sleek metallic snuffer with a silk tassel—because luxury candles aren't blown out.
• The Midnight Trunk: A deep matte-black display box that screams premium.

How to Use
The Setup: Open the black trunk to reveal the gold-on-black contrast.
The Glow: Place the mini tins around the geometric pillar and light them up using the taper matches for a 360-degree golden aura.
The Finale: Once the party is over, use the tasseled snuffer to extinguish the flames elegantly, keeping the wax clean for your next milestone.

Specialty
Specially designed for Glamorous Birthday Parties. This is the crown jewel of our "Story Candle" collection. While other sets are cute, the Golden Gala is for the person who wants a birthday that feels like a VIP red-carpet event. It’s about celebrating a big year with even bigger style.

How We Made It
We used high-definition geometric molds for the centerpiece to ensure every angle catches the light. The candles are poured with a clean-burning soy blend, and the metallic finishes are hand-applied. Every accessory, from the bee motifs to the silk tassel, is hand-selected to ensure your kit is nothing short of a masterpiece.

Wrap Up
Level up your celebration. The Meltix Golden Gala is for those who don’t just have birthdays—they have milestones.

What’s Inside
The ultimate aesthetic kit for those who love soft colors and vintage vibes:
• Vintage Piped Cake: A centerpiece candle featuring hand-piped 'frosting' in pink and lilac wax.
• Twisted Taper Set: Mint and lavender candles tied with a cream satin ribbon.
• Ribbed Taper Set: Sage and peach textured candles tied with a forest green ribbon.
• Ombre Taper Set: Dreamy pink-to-blue gradient candles tied with a blush ribbon.
• Smooth Taper Set: Classic pastel blue and yellow candles tied with a lilac ribbon.
• The Signature Trunk: A crisp white Meltix box filled with pastel confetti and silk tissue.

How to Use
The Reveal: Open the white trunk for an instant burst of pastel magic—perfect for a birthday morning surprise.
The Aesthetic: Place the vintage cake candle in the center. It’s so realistic, it doubles as a decor piece!
The Vibe: Untie the satin ribbons and place the various tapers around your space to create a soft, "Pinterest-perfect" birthday glow.

Specialty
Specially designed for Aesthetic Birthdays. This is the "sweetest" chapter of our "Story Candle" collection. Designed for the dreamers, it captures the 'Coquette' and 'Vintage' trends perfectly. It’s the ideal gift for a best friend or sister who wants their birthday to feel like a fairytale.

How We Made It
Each cake candle is a work of art, with the wax frosting hand-piped by our artisans using traditional cake-decorating techniques. We custom-blend our wax dyes to achieve these specific pastel tones and hand-tie every satin ribbon to ensure your kit arrives looking like a curated masterpiece.

Wrap Up
Make their birthday as sweet as they are. The Meltix Pastel Party kit turns a simple celebration into an unforgettable aesthetic memory.

What’s Inside
A sophisticated collection of tapers for the ultimate color-coordinated celebration:
• 10 Signature Tapers: A curated mix of matte pastels (blush, mint, lilac, sky blue) and two shimmering glitter-gold candles.
• Meltix Matchbox: A custom-branded box of premium safety matches.
• Classic Bell Snuffer: A silver-finished wick snuffer to extinguish your candles with grace.
• The Minimalist Trunk: A sleek cream display box with rose-gold foil branding.

How to Use
Curate: Select the colors that match your theme and place them in your favorite candle holders.
Ignite: Use the Meltix matches to light your "wish candles" one by one.
Preserve: When the celebration ends, use the bell snuffer to safely douse the flame without any smoke, keeping the wax pristine.

Specialty
Specially designed for Intimate Birthday Dinners. This is the "versatile" chapter of our "Story Candle" collection. It’s perfect for the person who loves variety and wants to create a unique color story across their dining table or mantle. Each candle features our embossed logo, adding a subtle touch of luxury to every "Happy Birthday" wish.

How We Made It
Each taper is hand-dipped and finished with a precision-embossed Meltix logo. We used a high-density wax blend to ensure these candles stand tall and burn slowly without dripping. The glitter tapers are hand-dipped in fine metallic dust to provide a sparkling contrast to the soft matte pastels.

Wrap Up
A spectrum of colors for a spectrum of wishes. The Meltix Pastel Palette is the ultimate gift for a birthday that’s minimalist in design but big on style.

What’s Inside
A magical, kinetic centerpiece that brings movement to your celebration:
• Rose Gold Kinetic Carousel: A precision-engineered metal turbine that spins using heat.
• Hanging Charms: A mix of rose gold horses and elegant swans that "dance" as the carousel rotates.
• Crystal Prisms: Teardrop crystals that catch the candlelight and scatter tiny rainbows.
• Meltix Signature Pillar: A central candle designed to provide the perfect heat for rotation.
• Integrated Branding: A custom-molded Meltix rose gold base.

How to Use
Assembly: Secure the carousel onto your birthday cake or a flat heat-safe surface.
The Ignition: Light the central Meltix pillar candle.
The Magic: As the air warms up, the turbine will automatically begin to spin, making the horses and swans gallop in a circle while the crystals shimmer.

Specialty
Specially designed for Fairytale Birthdays. This is the most "enchanting" chapter of our "Story Candle" collection. It’s not just a candle; it’s a mechanical work of art. While standard candles just sit there, the Carousel Wish tells a story of wonder and movement, making the absolute highlight of any birthday cake.

How We Made It
This kit combines physics with luxury. We used a lightweight rose gold alloy for the turbine to ensure it spins with even a small flame. Each charm is hand-balanced to maintain the rotation speed, and the crystals are precision-cut for maximum light refraction. It’s a delicate balance of engineering and aesthetic design.

Wrap Up
Why have a static cake when you can have a moving masterpiece? The Meltix Carousel Wish turns the simple act of lighting a candle into a mesmerizing show. Make a wish and watch the magic spin.

What’s Inside
The "all-in-one" toolkit for a sophisticated birthday bash. This cream and gold Meltix hamper features:
• Signature Cream Pillar: A large, smooth-finish candle embossed with our rose-gold logo.
• Metallic Votive Quad: Four textured gold candle tins for a warm, flickering glow.
• Taper Duo Tubes: Two sleek tubes containing premium long-stem taper candles.
• Golden Accent Kit: A pair of shimmering gold balloons and two matching celebration crackers.
• Tasseled Party Horn: A designer gold party blower to announce the birthday wish in style.
• The Royal Trunk: A champagne-toned box finished with a massive, hand-tied gold satin bow.

How to Use
The Grand Opening: Untie the gold bow to reveal the curated celebration layers resting on golden crinkle paper.
Light the Night: Start with the smaller votives to set the base lighting, then light the main pillar as the "wish" candle.
The Fanfare: Use the crackers for the surprise reveal and blow the tasseled horn to kick off the party!

Specialty
Specially designed for Elegant Birthdays. This kit is the "Sophisticate" chapter of our "Story Candle" collection. It’s built for the person who wants a birthday that feels expensive, curated, and timeless. Whether it's a 30th birthday or a golden jubilee, this set ensures the celebration is as classy as the person being celebrated.

How We Made It
We chose a "Champagne & Gold" palette to signify success and joy. The large pillar is hand-poured with our slowest-burning wax blend to ensure it lasts through the entire party. The votives are specially textured to maximize light reflection, and every box is hand-tied with a double-faced satin ribbon for that perfect "pre-opened" luxury look.

Wrap Up
Gift them the gold standard of birthdays. The Meltix Champagne Celebration kit is more than just candles—it’s a party in a box, designed for who celebrate with grace and a touch of glamour.

What’s Inside
A perfectly paired set for the couple that glows together. This deep burgundy Meltix hamper features:
• The Amber Glow Jar: A rich, dark glass candle with a deep, sophisticated fragrance.
• The Frosted Silk Jar: A soft, frosted white candle for a light and romantic scent profile.
• Romantic Decor: Premium silk ribbons and a bed of fresh-look red and pink rose petals.
• Celebration Kit: A mini bouquet of heart-shaped balloons and three metallic party blowers (Gold & Silver).
• The Velvet Trunk: A luxurious maroon box with gold foil branding, lined with premium fabric.

How to Use
The Ambiance: Open the box to reveal the rose petals—the ultimate romantic gesture.
The Lighting: Place the Amber and Frosted jars on opposite sides of your dinner table or bedside. Light them together to symbolize the union of two souls.
The Moment: Use the heart balloons and blowers to add a playful touch to your anniversary toast.

Specialty
Specially designed for Anniversaries. This is the "Unity" chapter of our "Story Candle" collection. Unlike single candles, the Eternal Duo represents the balance between two people—one bold (Amber) and one soft (Frosted). It’s the ideal gift for a spouse or a favorite couple celebrating another year of love.

How We Made It
We paired these jars to create a visual and olfactory harmony. The glass jars are premium-grade and reusable, while the wax is hand-poured with high-concentration fragrance oils that fill a room without being overwhelming. Every box is hand-decorated with silk ribbons and petals to ensure it’s "proposal-ready" the moment it arrives.

Wrap Up
Two flames, one story. The Meltix Eternal Duo kit is the ultimate way to say "I'd choose you all over again."

What’s Inside
A beautifully symbolic kit representing the intertwined lives of a couple. This executive black Meltix trunk features:
• The Sculptural Duo: One cream wavy pillar and one metallic bronze pillar, designed with a unique "knot" texture.
• The Heart Core: A miniature rose-gold heart candle nestled perfectly between the two pillars.
• Anniversary Keepsake Card: A premium cream card with "Happy Anniversary to Us" scripted in elegant gold.
• Metallic Balloons: Miniature gold and bronze balloons to elevate the party vibe.
• Signature Accents: Burgundy and taupe silk ribbons with scattered copper heart confetti.
• The Executive Trunk: A high-end black display box with a soft, cream-lined interior.

How to Use
The Toast: Open the box during your anniversary toast to reveal the coordinated gold and bronze theme.
The Glow: Place the pillars side-by-side. Light them together to signify two unique paths glowing as one.
The Memory: Display the "Happy Anniversary" card in your home as a reminder of another beautiful year together.

Specialty
Specially designed for Wedding Anniversaries. This is the "Connection" chapter of our "Story Candle" collection. The "Knot" design of the candles is a visual metaphor for the strength and beauty of a long-term bond. It is the perfect gift for a partner who values deep meaning and sophisticated home decor.

How We Made It
We used specialized 3D molds to create the intricate, fluid texture of the white pillar. The metallic bronze pillar is hand-finished with a high-shine lacquer to provide a striking contrast. Each kit is hand-curated to ensure the card, heart, and ribbons are perfectly positioned for that immediate romantic "wow" moment upon opening.

Wrap Up
Celebrate the knot that holds you together. The Meltix Anniversary Knot kit turns your special milestone into a curated aesthetic memory.

What’s Inside
A sculptural masterpiece capturing the essence of togetherness. This premium Meltix shadow box includes:
• The Embrace Pillars: Two hand-poured candles—one cream and one dusty rose—sculpted in a timeless, intimate embrace.
• Velvet Ribbon Duo: Elegant burgundy and soft peach velvet ribbons for a touch of texture.
• Gilded Botanical: A gold-sprayed leaf accent to symbolize the growth of your love.
• Keepsake Tag: A delicate "Happy Anniversary" tag to commemorate the date.
• Copper Accents: Miniature copper-toned balloons and a wire balloon motif.
• The Signature Shadow Box: A high-end black display box with a glass front and gold foil logo.

How to Use
The Display: Keep the candles inside the glass shadow box as a stunning piece of anniversary decor for your bedroom or mantle.
The Ritual: On your special night, remove the "Embrace Pillars" and place them on a heat-safe tray. Light them together to symbolize two lives becoming one beautiful light.
The Style: Use the velvet ribbons and gilded leaf to accent your anniversary dinner table setting.

Specialty
Specially designed for Wedding Anniversaries. This is the "Intimacy" chapter of our "Story Candle" collection. It’s more than a gift; it’s a representation of the bond between a couple. The silhouette is designed to be a conversation starter and a constant reminder of the warmth of a hug.

How We Made It
Each "Embrace Pillar" is hand-cast in custom-designed sculptural molds using our signature soy-wax blend. We selected the dusty rose and cream palette to represent the perfect balance of passion and peace. The shadow box is hand-assembled, ensuring every element—from the velvet to the gold leaf—is perfectly positioned for a gallery-quality presentation.

Wrap Up
Celebrate the hug that changed everything. The Meltix Eternal Embrace kit is a tribute to love that looks just as beautiful unlit as it does glowing in the dark.

What’s Inside
A nostalgic masterpiece that takes you back to the magic of your wedding day. This velvet-lined Meltix trunk features:
• The Wedding Pillars: Two intricately sculpted candles—a tuxedo pillar in metallic bronze and a bridal gown pillar with stunning lace-embossed details.
